description: Set a history of a flow plane vertex variable. Review the common c history commands. The history can be assigned a name for later reference with the optional name keyword. If not, the history will be given a default name based on its internally assigned id number.

keywords.name: flowplanevertex-id
keywords.description: Set history location at the flowplane vertex with ID i .

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: Set history location at the position v . The flowplane vertex closest to v will be used to provde the history values.

keywords.name: aperture-hydraulic
keywords.description: Set a history of hydraulic aperture

keywords.name: aperture-mechanical
keywords.description: Set a history of mechanical aperture

keywords.name: proppant-vconcentration
keywords.description: Set a history of volume concentration of proppant.

keywords.name: proppant-mconcentration
keywords.description: Set a history of mass concentration of proppant.

keywords.name: proppant-thickness
keywords.description: Set a history of proppant thickness.
